title: taraxia breviflora
intro: Taraxia breviflora, also known as the small-flowered taraxia or false chamomile, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as indigestion and diarrhea due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Taraxia breviflora include relief from menstrual cramps, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
